source_model.adaptation_rule: Keep the operational shape, remove repo-specific paths, and require target repos to bind concrete query, wrapper, and log paths during local adoption.

purpose: Make index-first routing, bounded reads, and compact command output the default so durable slice work does not burn context on giant logs, registries, generated indexes, or raw command output.

allowed_before_index_routing: the canonical methodology or local workflow contract
not_a_blanket_exception: If the named file is a giant log, registry, JSONL stream, generated index, or large control-plane note, use targeted reads or index routing first.
Startup files should still be read by targeted section when they are known to be large.

forbidden_full_reads: giant roadmap, control-plane, or handoff notes
raw command logs unless debugging that exact log

preferred_routing_surfaces.query_first_rule: Query the local authority map, repo index, roadmap index, file inventory, or exact-path lookup before opening large repo-truth files.
target_repo_must_bind: roadmap or plan index command or file
preferred_routing_surfaces.fallback_when_no_index_exists: Use rg or file inventory first, then a bounded targeted read around exact keys. Do not full-read large files just because the target repo has not built an index yet.

implementation_slice: query or inspect only named owner surfaces
run owning validator with summary or compact output
avoid broad generated refresh unless the refresh decision requires it

read_escalation_ladder.required_escalation_phrase: Need wider read because <specific missing fact>. Reading <path> lines <range> only.

command_output_policy.raw_output_escalation_rule: If compact output is insufficient, search the saved /tmp log for the exact missing field first. Dumping raw output is allowed only when the exact missing field cannot be extracted from the saved log.

slice_packet_integration.source_reads_rule: Slice packets should name the exact source reads needed and should prefer index/query evidence before large file reads.
slice_packet_integration.focused_validation_rule: Focused validators should expose --summary-only or an equivalent compact mode whenever practical.
slice_packet_integration.refresh_rule: Generated indexes and broad discovery refreshes are governed by the slice packet refresh_decision, not by habit.

localization_notes: Replace placeholder routing surfaces with target-repo commands or files during bootstrap.
Do not copy vbtpro-lab paths into another repo.
Keep this contract focused on token and output discipline; heavy-run topology belongs in a separate target-repo policy when needed.
